entry.title: invenioLSI is hiring Project Managers in the US TODAY!
entry.content:
SAP Project Manager (PMP) (US Citizen or Permanent Resident required)

Company website: invenioLSI 

Apply directly here: SAP Project Manager (PMP) (US Citizen or Permanent Resident required) 

 
About invenioLSI 
The largest independent global SAP solutions provider serving the public sector as well as offering specialist skills in media and entertainment. We bring deep expertise combined with advanced technologies to enable organizations to modernize so they can run at the speed of today’s business. We know how to navigate the extraordinary complexities of international businesses and public sector organizations, working with stakeholders to drive change and create agile organizations of tomorrow using the technologies of today. Learn more at www.invenioLSI.com. 

SAP Project Manager (PMP) (US Citizen or Permanent Resident required)

Qualified candidates must have PMP and managed multiple full life cycle SAP solution implementations in Public Sector which included Public Sector Finance, HCM / HR, and/or Public Sector Procurement.  Prior experience as either a technical or functional consultant is helpful, but not required.

Candidates should have strong functional skills/knowledge and have the ability to manage a team of employees, sub-contractors, and client-facing relationships.  The ideal candidate will have strong pre-sales, sales, and post-sales client presentation experience, as well as the ability to guide the project team through implementation processes such as planning, fit/gap analysis, configuration, testing, rollout, and the post-implementation support of SAP Public Sector solutions. Minimum 2 full lifecycle implementations – following ASAP or Activate methodology -  from project prep thru Run SAP, and at least one in a team lead role.

 

Job Overview
Oversee all facets of the software implementation project to complete the effort on time within budget and with the contracted scope.
 
Proven successful experience in:
  • Initiating, Planning, Executing, Monitoring & Controlling, and Closing of a software implementation project;
  • Developing and delivering plans for integration management, scope management, time management, cost management, quality management, staff management, communications management, risk management, procurement management, issue management, and stakeholder management.
Responsibilities
  • Lead or oversee all facets of the project;
  • Develop and maintain and loaded and leveled work plan to deliver all contractual deliverables and work products within the contracted start and end dates;
  • Develop and maintain an accurate project budget for actual and forecasted hours;
  • Maintain or improve the contracted margin;
  • Track and deliver all contracted deliverables on schedule;
  • Track and deliver all contracted work products;
  • Track and deliver all methodology required work products;
  • Maintain deliverable and work product quality;
  • Track and meet contracted and work plan milestones;
  • Maintain the project contract and execute change orders as needed to make sure the contract matches the project that is being delivered;
  • Lead and manage the project team members (including employees and contractors);
  • Seeks ways to increase the project team effectiveness;
  • May act as a mentor to Consultants and Sr. Consultants;
  • Works well as a leader of the entire team (motivates team);
  • Track and effectively communicate the project status both up and down the communication chain;
  • Execute effective overall project communications;
  • Participate in pre-sales activities or additional internal tasks as required;
  • Deliver assigned projects following established PMO standards/guidelines, as well as within SAP Methodology standards;
  • Establish and maintain an effective Issue and Risk Management plan;
  • Serve as the initial escalation point for all project issues, risks, and changes;
  • Proactively communicate resource needs and maintain model throughout the project life cycle; 
  • Facilitate conflict resolution within the team and escalate when needed;
  • Establish clear expectations regarding status reporting, team communication, and deliverable management;
  • Supports the program manager on assigned tasks or manages a group of sub-activities;
  • Serve as a subject matter expert in project management.
Required Skills
  • PMP required* 
  • Full SAP lifecycle implementation experience;
  • 3+ years of industry and project management experience;
  • 3+ years experience in either State & Local government, K-12, Utilities, Higher Education, Healthcare, or Defense industries;
  • Knowledge of key integration points between core modules or solutions such as FI, CO, MM,
  • Aptitude for consulting;
  • Ability to implement practical business solutions under strict deadlines;
  • Ability and desire to work with people as part of a high-performance team;
  • Ability to meet client’s needs with a strong commitment to service;
  • Ability to manage customer expectations against contractual agreements;
  • Understanding of Matrix organizational structures;
  • Strong desire to excel;
  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills;
  • Strong client presentation experience;
  • Solid experience in project planning tools (e.g., MS Project).
Additional Key Skills
  • Excellent leadership and communication skills;
  • Excellent customer service focus and attitude;
  • Excellent influencing and communication skills;
  • Strong ability to listen, respond and build trust;
  • Strong teamwork and collaboration skills;
  • Strong ability to manage detailed tasks to completion;
  • A Bachelors and/or a Master’s Degree or equivalent;
  • Public Sector Experience highly desirable;
  • CAPM, PMP, and/or Activate certification preferred.
This role requires up to 30% monthly travel.
 
invenioLSI is an Equal Opportunity Employer that does not discriminate on the basis of actual or perceived race, color, creed, religion, national origin, ancestry, citizenship status, age, **bleep** or gender (including pregnancy, childbirth and pregnancy-related conditions), gender identity or expression (including transgender status), sexual orientation, marital status, military service and veteran status, physical or mental disability, genetic information, or any other characteristic protected by applicable federal, state or local laws and ordinances. invenioLSI’s management team is dedicated to this policy with respect to recruitment, hiring, placement, promotion, transfer, training, compensation, benefits, employee activities, access to facilities and programs and general treatment during employment.

entry.title: Extend the field XBLNR in the MIRO / Fatura
entry.content: I would like to know if have some SAP notes to update the field XBLNR when create the MIRO for Brazil localization

entry.title: Re: New trial capability for SAP Application Interface Framework
entry.content: it seems that i got the answer on OSS note 3071632 - AIF - AIFGEN software component, installation, AIF license related issues - SAP for Me, the AIF license is needed for testing custom interfaces.

entry.title: Re: Connecting SAP Analytics Cloud to Power BI Using Azure Data Factory
entry.content: Excellent!!!

entry.title: What is the use of condition type 'STOC' in the S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
entry.content:
What is the use of condition type 'STOC' is then for? You should be able to see this condition type if you open 'Change Determination Records' app.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: What is the use of condition type 'STOC' in the S/4HA...
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

The condition type 'STOC' is used for stock determination. It is used to determine the stock type for a particular material during sales order processing. 

When a sales order is created, the system checks the stock type of the material based on various factors such as plant, storage location, and availability. The condition type 'STOC' is used to determine the appropriate stock type for the material based on these factors.

Regarding the App "Change Determination Records - Master Data", you can use the app to enable the system to find a packing instruction by specific characteristics.

You define a packing instruction/reference packing instruction that refers to specific characteristics, such as material/reference material and ship-to party. If you now want to pack this specific material for this specific ship-to party, the system can find the predefined packing instructions and use them to create one or more HU proposals that exactly fit the requirements of the customer. Packing instruction determination thus automates the packing process.

To enable the packing instruction determination, see Creating Determination Records.

I hope this helps!

Thank you and best regards,

SAP Support.

entry.title: Change the start time of one of the operations for production order on CM25
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Please advise the following scenario -

I'm able to change the start time of one operation for a production order via drag & drop functionality on CM25, but the operations that follow the changed operation are not automatically rescheduled. The relationship between operations in routing is sequential (standard sequence).

Is it possible to make all following operations be automatically rescheduled when one operation is rescheduled?

Thanks,

Yimin

entry.title: Re: Brownfield Data Migration Project Plan Template
entry.content:
ca. 500 tables, over 0,5billion records. High number of fields.

Archiving strategy follows later. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Results Analysis Using Earned Values (POC is not upda...
entry.content: Use transaction code CNE1 or CNE2 to update the POC% to Result Analysis calculation.

entry.title: Re: Failed to commit objects to server : Undefined Info Store
entry.content: SP4 Patch 500 don't solve the problem.

entry.title: Re: Increasing number of Compensation Forms routing at once?
entry.content: @CSmith thank you so much for letting me know! To your knowledge, does the backend Route Form menu employ the exact same functionality as using the "send to Next Step" button in the Forms inbox?

Manoel Costa,
This was really insightfull.
Thank you for sharing this blog. Keep up the work.

Regards,
Hitesh

entry.title: Re: Solution Options for Production Planning and Scheduling
entry.content:
Hi Aiskalla,

DSC is based on S/4HANA, so the integration scenarios between S/4HANA Cloud Public edition and S/4HANA should be applicable. Please check the available APIs: Overview | SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

entry.title: Re: Can I adjust the number of digits displayed after dec...
entry.content: @MridulSharmaSF thank you for commenting back, however we're not looking to set up a scale adjustment to the calculation, we want to continue with a Calculated Rating as-is. I just wanted to see if there was a way to visually display, for example, "2.42/5.0" as "2.42/5.00", and "Performance Goal Section Rating: 2.5" as "Performance Goal Section Rating: 2.50" - aka two digits past the decimal, even if it's a zero. The question is purely aesthetic, not a functional question.

entry.title: Re: What is the use of condition type 'STOC' in the S/4HA...
entry.content: Lets take an example: Condition Type 0OBD (for WM managed location) and SHIP (for IM managed location) is to determine auto packaging during outbound process. in 'Create Determination Record for Pkg Instruction'. How STOC condition type is different. I am not clear what you mean by stock type. When and how do i use STOC for auto packaging. Is this for auto packaging for warehouse stock (not attached to any orders yet)? Thanks

entry.title: Re: What material's type is usually used for waste materi...
entry.content: The answer is ABF - Waste.

entry.title: Re: Replication Flow Blog Series Part 2 – Premium Outbound Integration
entry.content:
Thank you for the detailed explanation, 
Is there any such document on how to connect SAP Datasphere to AWS ?

entry.title: SAP Developer News, June 20th, 2024
entry.content:
DESCRIPTION

Generate your own custom UI Service based on a Business Object Interface

  • Tutorial to generate Custom UI Service based on a C1-released Business Object Interface: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-cloud-ui-from-interface.html

SAP Open Source Webinar “How to fight the dependency hell”

  • Renovate https://github.com/renovatebot/renovate
  • Webinar details & registration: https://events.sap.com/how-to-fight-dependency-hell/en/registration.aspx
  • OSPO Webinars home page https://events.sap.com/ospo-webinars/en/home

Collaborate on your SAP Build Code project with your teammates!

  • Tutorial to set up Build Code on BTP: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-code-setup..html
  • Help Portal - Managing Members : https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP%20Build/9d385a1842594230993661ca78dce150/1ae0d5af7a9946cc96936bd175041148.html
  • Blog post on Collaborate on your Build Code project by Rupa Maity: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/collaborate-on-your-sap-build-code-project-with-your-teammates/ba-p/13720813

API anomaly detection and Event Mesh capability of SAP Integration Suite

  • API Anomaly Detection in SAP Integration Suite: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/api-anomaly-detection-in-sap-integration-suite/ba-p/13726636
  • API Anomaly Detection infographic: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/use-the-api-anomaly-detection-feature-in-sap-integration-suite-to-detect/ba-p/13733045
  • Meet your new friend EMIS: Event Mesh in SAP Integration Suite: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/meet-your-new-friend-emis-event-mesh-in-sap-integration-suite/ba-p/13731129
  • Event-driven integrations: Exploring the Event Mesh capability of SAP Integration Suite: https://youtube.com/live/tUIG34xT3oo

CHAPTER TITLES

0:00 Intro
0:10 Generate your own custom UI Service based on a Business Object Interface
1:30 SAP Open Source Webinar “How to fight the dependency hell”
2:50 Collaborate on your SAP Build Code project with your teammates!
4:13 API anomaly detection and Event Mesh capability of SAP Integration Suite

TRANSCRIPT

This is the SAP Developer News for June 20th, 2024.

[Shilpa] Hello, ABAP developers. We all know business objects are the building blocks for modeling data. Well, business object interfaces are provided by SAP in order to release business objects so that it can be used or extended by customers using the ABAP Cloud development model. Now, by defining the stability contracts, it is possible to use such C1-released business object within other software components. Now, once you have used these business objects, you might want to create your own custom UI. In order to make it easier for customers to build custom UIs on top of the released business objects, SAP has provided a new wizard as part of the ABAP Development Tools in the latest series of SAP BTP, ABAP environment. Now, in this tutorial, our friend Andre Fischer shows how you can use this wizard to generate your own custom UI on top of the SAP C1 released business object interface, a ILSK bank TP. In this way, you can leverage growing number of released business objects that are based on ABAP RESTful application programming model to create your own UI on top as extension in ABAP Cloud. The link to this tutorial is in the description below. And we'll check it out.

[DJ] Making sure you're running the correct versions of software with the latest book fixes and features is a pretty important task. Scale this up to an enterprise the size of SAP, a producer and consumer of many, many open source libraries and packages, and this becomes a mammoth undertaking with those libraries, packages, and dependencies that are involved. There are many teams internally at SAP who have turned to the open source tool, Renovate, and use it at scale for this dependency management work. If this sounds interesting to you and you want to find out more, then we've got an upcoming SAP open-source webinar just for you. On the 25th of June, join Tobias Gabriel, a senior developer in the open source program office who will explain how SAP uses Renovate at scale, and also will talk about the shift, the paradigm shift towards the automation of dependency management in enterprises like SAP. All the details about this webinar and how to register are in the description.

[Shrini] Hello, SAP community. Would it be fun to share your code with your teammates? That's exactly what you can do with a build code project from the SAP Build Lobby. If you're interested in learning how to enable SAP Build Code in your BTP account, check out this tutorial. When you create a new full-stack project from the Build Lobby, you'll provide a project name, description, and select a dev space. If a dev space doesn't already exist, a new one will be created for you. Once your project is open, you can add any Git-based repository as a remote repo using the simplified Git panel. To share the project with your team members, we'll also need to add them as collaborators in the GitHub settings. In the SAP Build Lobby, you will find an option called Manage Members for your build code project. This feature allows you to authorize your team members to access the project as long as they have access to the same sub-account. Your team members can then access the project by selecting a dev space and providing their credentials. The repository will be cloned onto their dev space. If you need more guidance, Rupa has written a fantastic blog with step-by-step instructions. You can find the link in the description below.

[Antonio] Hola, SAP Developer. As part of the announcements that we had for SAP Sapphire, it was announced that there will be a new functionality in API management called the API anomaly detection. Now my colleague Shruthi recently published a blog post which shows you how to enable the functionality and  lso what should you expect from this new functionality. There is also a very nice infographic that my colleague Kasturi created, which really distills what the functionality is. So make sure to check that out as well. There is now a new capability in SAP Integration Suite, which is the Event Mesh capability. So now Event Mesh is within the different capabilities that are part of SAP Integration Suite. Check out the blog post by Karsten, where he basically shares with us what you should expect from this new capability. And if you want to see the capability in action, this week I had the opportunity to do a livestream, where I basically go through the entire process of activating the new capability. Also, I connected to a CAP application, consume messages from Cloud Integration. We also connected to an S/4HANA Cloud. So make sure to check that out so that you can see the capability in action.

entry.title: Revaluation of a purchase order price due to a material price change
entry.content:
We need to run a revaluation of a purchase order due to a material price change. This works in the company currency but does not work in a functional currency different to the company currency, using the MRNB transaction ( yes it exists in S/4HANA Cloud Public edition!)

The material currency is the company currency. The PO is in the functional currency (which is different to the company currency).

The business scenario is that the amount we pay for the product (sucrose from sugar cane) changes every quarter and we need to back pay the suppliers for sucrose supplied prior to the change in price. 

 

Any ideas, work aorunds or suggestions as to another method of achieving this result?

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility 

SAP S/4HANA 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Publish back compensation information to EC
entry.content:
Hi all,

I was looking for an option to publish back data to compensation information. I can find some information that say: We can now publish to Compensation Information fields that aren’t specific to recurring or non-recurring pay components. But other Documentation is saying you can only publish back Recurring Pay Components, Non Recurring Pay Components and Job Information fields.

Is there an option to publish back data within the comp information?

entry.title: Re: Publish back compensation information to EC
entry.content: I mean the publish back option from the compensation module to EC.

When I try to connect them in the settings, I get an error:

entry.title: Re: Envisioning the future: outcome of the Water Executive Value Network sessions in Monterrey
entry.content: This type of initiative has allowed companies such as those in the water and sanitation sector to share their experiences and find synergies that allow them to quickly adopt technology for the improvement of their processes.

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite relation to SAP Extensibility guideline
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

There's is a training planned within our team regarding SAP Extensibility guideline template. 

We are working on PO to CI migration, How can we make use of SAP Extensibility guideline template for SAP Integration Suite? Can SAP Extensibility be used for redesign of Proxy/Flat file interfaces? Could you please let me know?  Accordingly, I could ask my trainer in the training session planned. Thank you! 

Regards, 

Ramu.

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content:
Cool! Quite curious the distance and analogies

I have played with different options and not always founding what I expected (but normally I have to admit they were related). Probably, as mentioned in some reply, due to the partial load

entry.title: Re: KONH - how to identify deleted conditions?
entry.content: Just to be sure...so if I filter KONP data to give me KNUMH for KOPOS = '01' and LOEVM_KO = 'X' and join with KONH based on keys KNUMH (Condition Record Number) , KAPPL ( Application), KSCHL (Condition Type), I should get list of conditions that are flagged for deletion but are in KONH - am I getting this right?

entry.title: Re: want to knw one letter for language keys
entry.content:
If you cannot easily access contents of table "T002" indicated in other answers, that table contents can be found here.

In case the link becomes broken, I copy/paste the most important contents below:

Table T002 contains these languages and their codes. Please find the list below.

Example: Serbian (Latin) is SH, or shYU, or d.

Z2 and Z3 are reserved for Customer languages. So you can setup these with e.g. your own “test” languages.

Table:          T002                          

SPRASLASPEZLAHQLAISOSPTXT           
0    S     0   SR   Serbian         
1    D     0   ZH   Chinese         
2    M     0   TH   Thai            
3    D     0   KO   Korean          
4    S     0   RO   Romanian        
5    S     0   SL   Slovenian       
6    S     0   HR   Croatian        
7    S     4   MS   Malaysian       
8    S     0   UK   Ukrainian       
9    S     0   ET   Estonian        
A    L     0   AR   Arabic          
B    L     0   HE   Hebrew          
C    S     4   CS   Czech           
D    S     1   DE   German          
E    S     1   EN   English         
F    S     2   FR   French          
G    S     0   EL   Greek           
H    S     4   HU   Hungarian       
I    S     2   IT   Italian         
J    D     2   JA   Japanese        
K    S     3   DA   Danish          
L    S     0   PL   Polish          
M    D     0   ZF   Chinese trad.   
N    S     2   NL   Dutch           
O    S     3   NO   Norwegian       
P    S     4   PT   Portuguese      
Q    S     0   SK   Slovakian       
R    S     3   RU   Russian         
S    S     2   ES   Spanish         
T    S     0   TR   Turkish         
U    S     3   FI   Finnish         
V    S     3   SV   Swedish         
W    S     4   BG   Bulgarian       
X    S     0   LT   Lithuanian      
Y    S     0   LV   Latvian         
Z    S     0   Z1   Customer reserve
a    S     0   AF   Afrikaans       
b    S     0   IS   Icelandic       
c    S     4   CA   Catalan         
d    S     4   SH   Serbian (Latin) 
i    S     0   ID   Indonesian      
y    S     0   Z3                   
z    S     0   Z2

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration - Connect to Microsoft 365 Mail with OAuth2
entry.content: Hi @smrk47 please check out Build Your Automation Using Microsoft 365 Cloud SDK of SAP Build Process Automation | SAP Tutorials

entry.title: Re: Innovating Towards a Sustainable Future: Insights from Rolf Adam
entry.content: Implico Software Assurance delivers value to: 1. SAP system integrators by enabling them to deliver the solution standard in downstream, 2. SAP to scale-up globally and 3. Customers giving them the expexted confidence that SDM and RFNO are designed and deployed based on best practices and SAP's architectural standards.

entry.title: Re: Get logged in user data in SAP Work Zone
entry.content: Hi Muzammo, I am trying to fetch the logged in user email on SAP Build Work Zone Advanced Edition. I want to use this value to display inside a UI integration card, and to filter data inside the card. I am having some difficult implementing your code. Could you please assist me? I am happy to share my project with you?

entry.title: $search not working for external service
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm using cap Node.js(odata v4) with an odata v2 external API connected through a destination. The search functionality for external entities in not working, when i try to search something it returns all the records not just the searched ones. I was able to search in a single field by creating a where clause as seen in the code:

 And after some experimentation I came up with the following solution and was able to search in Multiple fields:

When I open the service endpoint for equipment entity and use URL?$search='some value' to test it, it works fine there but when I test the search in the FIORI value help dialog box it doesn't work. Any ideas why it's not working in the app & is there a better way to implement the search functionality ?

entry.title: Re: Get logged in user data in SAP Work Zone
entry.content: Hi Stippi, could you explain how I do this in a UI integration card deployed on Build Work Zone?

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Please get latest version of SAP Logon here:

SAP Logon Java / Windows

  • Windows SAP Logon 8.00 patch level 7
  • Java SAP Logon 7.80 rev 7

Don't be confused about the release 1909, renaming to 2022 or better renaming to release independent would be a different ( second ) step.

 

Best wishes Ralf

entry.title: Re: Housekeeping on audit logs
entry.content: I think your problem can be solved with this extension from SAP: 2793188 - [How To] Audit Clean up Job. Alternatively you could write your own in a similar fashion if you want more bells and whistles.

entry.title: Mensaje: FV635 Cargue extracto bancario
entry.content:
Buenas tardes,

Por favor su ayuda con el siguiente mensaje al cargar el extracto bancario por la transacción FF_5.

entry.title: Re: Questions re: "Multi-model with SAP HANA Cloud" developer challenge
entry.content:
Yes, it is one of the errors I introduced in the notebook to challenge you 🤓

Please check the part of connecting to the HANA db with the previous week. Give it another try to resolve it! If you won't be able to find the root cause of the issue, then let me know, and I will help you.

entry.title: BTMF Issue in SOM
entry.content:
Even though i did not enter my Subscription Order and Subscription Contract Transaction type in BMTF -> Activate Change Process -> Define Transaction Type in Process for Change_TR ( Change Technical Resource) change process, still i was able to change Technical resource in my contract, that too after it was technically active and distributed to FICA.

Can any body explain why it allowed for my transaction type. Attaching screenshots of BMTF and my contract history.

If this is the Standard behavior then is there a way to restrict for certain transaction types only certain BTMF processes should be visible?

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 1 - Setup
entry.content:
It is not "late" if before Wednesday, July 3rd @raulruiz 

Thank you for joining!

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 3 - Image Embed
entry.content:
Insane similarity? LOL!! I loved it 

By the way, my responses. More similar:

Less similar

I have no pet for the last topic so I tried with an image from me just for fun. Well, the result.....  I guess I deserved it, I knew something like this could happen 🙂 🙂

entry.title: Re: Embedding Business Context with the SAP HANA Cloud, Vector Engine
entry.content: Great content , thank you, the second video posted doesn't have sound?

entry.title: Re: Comunidad SAP en Español.
entry.content:
Buen día.

Tengo el siguiente problema alguien sabe porque sucede esto.

Para el cuadre diario se esta teniendo unas diferencias que parecieran un error del sistema.
Está la siguiente factura 014-001-01-00331595, las líneas del documento muestran un descuento, pero en el total de la factura no se refleja.
Cabe mencionar que el valor que se contabilizó fue 112.5 no 99.38

Cuando intento replicar el escenario de nuevo al llenar una factura no se vuelve a repetir

Adjunto imágenes.

 

.

Gracias de antemano.

entry.title: Re: Blog Series- 1: SAP C4C Service cloud V2 integration with S4 Hana Utility (ISU)
entry.content: @delateja I ll share soon

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI Scripts Recorder not available anymore - What...
entry.content: @rspecht: Thank you for the Hint. I have no authorization to run RZ11 transaction. A few months ago this would be possible and I could use the recorder and check the steps. Now I cannot even find how to Exit a transaction to return to the main menu. Very frustrating. Is there anything I can do from this point?

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports Memory issue
entry.content: I see a similar issue. Were you able to get it fixed?

entry.title: Newcomer
entry.content:
Hello everyone.  My name is Holly and I am looking forward to learning here and becoming successful and obtain my certification to help move me on to better paths as a production supervisor/ manager.  Any helpful tips on where to start/navigate to start my learning process would be fantastic!

Have a wonderful evening!

entry.title: Re: sap mdk action bar style navigating from object list...
entry.content: Hi @Jitendra_Kansal thank you so much. can you please check this one, https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/object-table-redraw-is-not-working/qaq-p/13726366

entry.title: Re: Increasing number of Compensation Forms routing at once?
entry.content: Yes and more. Have a look at this KBA 2292198 - How to use the Route Form Tool in Admin Center? - Performance Management

entry.title: C# Script SAP GUI Select all column of table
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to select all columns of a table where the select all top corner symbol does not exist.

The plan is to copy the full content of the table to the clipboard.

I am not sure (and cannot run the recorder) how to do this.

You can manually select the first column and drag until you reach the last.

On some tables, you can use CTRL+A to select all table contents. On others you cannot. This is the case.

Only a Copy text appears in the context menu (right click) and for that all columns need to be selected first.

I have attached the 2 different examples (3 images).

I believe this is the table object: /app/con[0]/ses[0]/wnd[0]/usr/cntlGRID1/shellcont/shell/shellcont[1]/shell

Please support.

Ideally, I would use C# but a VB.NET example would help a lot (assuming I can revert it to C#). 

Thank you all.

entry.title: SAP HANA DB - Transport/Package Custom Schema and underlying custom table
entry.content:
Hi all,

Need guidance on how to Transport custom table created under custom schema in SAP HANA DB. I am aware of Export/Import but i need a mechanism to do it via transport or maybe how we can package it.

Regards,

Salil

entry.title: How to check whether sap kernel is ext or ex2?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a question. I don't know how to check whether the SAP Kernel I am currently using is EX2 or EXT.

We need your help.

Regards.

entry.title: SAP MDK flexible column in web view
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

What is the behaviour of the Flexible Column layout in web view ? 

As per the document, 

https://help.sap.com/doc/f53c64b93e5140918d676b927a3cd65b/Cloud/en-US/docs-en/guides/features/fiori-ui/mdk/flexible-column-layout-page.html 

It has explained only about phone and Tablet. 

In web view, it behaves like a phone, though it is a larger width. 

Any help would be really appreciated.

CC: @bill_froelich @Jitendra_Kansal 

Thanks,

Ram

entry.title: Re: Question aobut the H2 Release OBX-25933
entry.content: No news right?

entry.title: SAP MDK web view css on bottom navigation tabs and object list
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I found some problem with running the application in web view, some of the css are not applying correctly.

Do I need to do anything to being the web view as much as close possible to Mobile View ? By adding additional css ?

This is my application look in iPad,

and this is the look in web view,

and this the look of the object cell click in Mobile and web,

 

@bill_froelich @Jitendra_Kansal 

Thanks in advance,

Ram

entry.title: SAP BUSINESS ONE, HELP ME @_@
entry.content:
I HAVE SOME QUESTIONS WHILE USING THE PROGRAM,

SO I'M LOOKING FOR ADVICE.

 

1. HOW TO FIXED COLUMN

IS THERE A WAY TO FIX THE COLUMN ON THE SCREEN? 

IF THERE ARE MANY COLUMNS IN THE ROW, 

I WANT TO FIX THE REQURED VALUES AND SEE THE VALUES.

FOR EXAMPLE, I WOULD LIKE TO FIX THE ITEM IN A/R INVOICE.

 

2. HOW TO SEARCH BY ACCOUNT SUBJECT NAME

WHEN REGISTERING FOR AN ACCOUNT SUBJECT IN THE JOURNAL, 

IT CAN BE ENTERED IMMEDIATELY BY ENTERING IT INTO THE ACCOUNT CODE,

AND EVEN IF YOU ENTER IT WITH THE ACCOUNT NAME,

IS THERE A WAY TO ENTER IT ON THE SCREEN?

 

3. IS IT POSSIBLE TO COPY DRAG WITHIN THE SCREEN?

I WONDER IF I CAN COPY AND PASTE DIRECTLY FROM THE SCREEN INSTEAD OF COPYING IT

TO EXCEL AND PASTING IT ON THE SCREEN.

 

I APPRECIATE A LOT OF HELP FOR BEGINNERS.

THANKS

entry.content: Thank you so much! I changed my Windows date display and it worked just fine.

In the debugging, I found that clientAPI.searchstring is empty even though I have entered value in the search field.

@bill_froelich @Jitendra_Kansal Please help me here.

Thanks,

Ram

entry.title: Re: Transaction 0000000245 cannot be delivered
entry.content: Hello, has this problem been solved? How was it resolved?

entry.title: How to maintain a price for Project member's timesheet(maybe defined a price every hour)
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We use "manage my timesheet"  APP to calculate Human resource worktime for a WBS. I want to know, in which App we can define a price or cost for their timesheet every hour?

And at start, project manager will assign a demand hour value for every member, does this price will also works in the demand hour?

Thanks

entry.title: Success Factors Mobile App
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I was looking at the Success Factors Mobile App today.

I would really like to promote it to our employees to increase their engagement with Success Factors.

I was really surprised that it does not feature the ability to add learning to history. Given how accessible mobile devices are these days, I expected this to be a feature. How easy would it be to add an item and upload the evidence from a mobile device.

Is this something that I just haven't found that is available?

If it isn't, is it something that is being explored by SAP?

Looking forward to your insights and thoughts.

Have a great day,

Benita

SAP SuccessFactors Mobile SAP SuccessFactors Learning

entry.title: Re: How to restrict the tabs "accounting 1", "accounting 2", "cost 1"
entry.content: Thanks sharing!

entry.title: specific batch for specific customer
entry.content: Hello, Expert, we have some stock batch, after quality checking, these stock batch only can be sold to customer 1 or customer 2. now don't have SO for customer 1 or customer 2, how to mark these batch , then to ensure other customer SO not allocate these stock, and once received customer 1 or customer 2 SO, then first allocate these specific batch stock,if specific batch stock not enough, then allocate the normal stock. RGDS Joanna Qiu

entry.title: Re: Availability of SAP Readiness Check for SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello Astrid,

Thanks for the blog. I did run the report in our production Solution Manager system and uploaded the zip folder in CALM readiness check for analysis.

Do you know when technical monitoring and ChaRM functionality will be available in CALM? I tried Health monitoring it seems to work with our on premise systems but not like the way we use our SOLMAN technical and PI monitoring which we built overtime using templates putting lot of effort and tweaks. I am looking forward to just upload our exisitng templates and get the same alerting as we have with our SOLMAN implementation from CALM.

We also heavily use enhanced retrofit process via ChaRM, CSOL, DGP with dual development and quality systems. I could not find any documentation regarding ChaRM and Retrofit processes available with CALM. Could you please shed some light on these topics or guide me to the documentation? I hope Doleres Correa reads this post and provides her thoughts if any of these are in CALM roadmap. 

Looking forward for a quick response.

Vinod

entry.title: Re: Publish back compensation information to EC
entry.content:
Yes this is possible. It must be configured in the xml. Please see the details in the Compensation EC integration Admin Guide.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_COMPENSATION/4b243325e2444067b4ad597e25e56850/808898fef34d43928bb30040ea16d75c.html

Hope this helps.

Christian

entry.title: Re: Function Module / Class EWM - Inbound delivery order...
entry.content:
Hello, expert,

I verify this class /SCWM/CL_HU_PACKING . it Just availabe when create a new HU then immediately to the method /SCWM/IF_PACK_BAS~PACK_STOCK. It is OKay.
If you use the exist HU in system and HU status is 'B', even it is empty, or delete it to recreate for status 'A', pack_stock is okay, but nerver display in inbound delivery. What an interesting issue.

entry.title: TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'getName')
entry.content:
Hello Experts !

Currently i have an issue with SAC story where typeError is occurring in edit mode and the error looks like this. I am able to view the dashboard all the widgets with data in view/present mode.

[ERROR] [LWMD] - Wasn't able to reconcile data model for view:[_SYS_BIC][t.5][Cfi4291353gpdiav5s6b5lb7155], TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'getName')
at https://assets.sapanalytics.cloud/production/uiAssets-2024.8.15/uiAssets/app.chunk.uqm-firefly-app-chunk.f6a7608738528c8a8bb6.js:1:334950

I request all of you to provide insights on this.

Thank you for your support !

entry.title: SAP Build CodeJam at TCS, Adibatla, Telangana on Jun 26th
entry.content:
Whether you are a developer, functional consultant, or business analyst, you will have the opportunity to create apps, processes and learn how to seamlessly connect them without coding. Want to try your hands on and discuss the latest updates on SAP Build? We invite you to participate in the upcoming SAP Build CodeJam.

 


This full day event will be held on June 26th and hosted by Tata Consultancy Services at Adibatla, Telangana.

RSVP "Yes" on this page and wait for our email.
https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/sap-build-create-business-apps-and-processes-without-code-telangana-india/ev-p/13732805

Limited seats left!

Hope you to see you there!

entry.title: Re: Getting dump error while click BADI Implementation
entry.content: hi @Ryan-Crosby  i checked the object in se24 i am getting this type of error what to do after that.

entry.title: Go-live with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud in the middle of their Fiscal period / calendar
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

I wanted to know what are the challenges of going live with S/4 HANA Public Cloud in middle of the fiscal year or period.

I acknowledge this option has certain drawbacks and would like to better understand the challenges, approaches / solutions, and learnings from actual implementations.

Appreciate the valuable insights to this!

Thanks 
Shimul

#S/4 HANA Public Cloud # S/4 HANA

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Finance

entry.title: Architecting Complex Real-Time Business Solutions: SAP Build Process Automation with Auto Approval
entry.content:
Welcome to our blog series on SAP BTP, where we delve into Build Process Automation for real-time business requirements and effortlessly handle complex scenarios using low-code and no-code development.

In this post, my colleague Adwait and I will delve into a complex solution that combines low-code and no-code techniques to streamline workflow design and approval with Auto Approval / Rejection Functionality.

Stay tuned for detailed insights, step-by-step instructions, and practical examples as we dive into the intricacies of SAP process automation. Whether you are a developer, business analyst, or SAP enthusiast, this series aims to empower you with the knowledge needed to optimize your processes.

Business Requirement: Problem Statement with Real world scenario :

When dealing with intricate workflows, there is often a need for automatic approval or rejection based on specific conditions. Consider the following real-world  Budget Approval Workflow scenario:

Employee submits a budget approval form: An employee initiates a budget approval process by submitting a form. This form triggers a workflow that involves multiple steps.

Manager’s approval: The workflow routes the approval request to the employee’s manager. The manager receives the work item in their inbox.

Deadline considerations: If the manager fails to approve the request within a certain deadline, the workflow should automatically reject the request and mark it as completed.

Scalability & Reusable Approach

In this blog post, we will explore a highly scalable solution that can be adapted to various business requirements. Our focus is on automating approval processes when deadlines are missed. Here are the scenarios we have considered:

  1. Auto Approval: If a deadline is missed, we will automatically set a specific work item for approval.
  2. Auto Rejection: Similarly, if a deadline is missed, we will set a specific work item for rejection.
  3. Next Approval Level: When deadlines are not met, we will handle work items for the next approval level.
  4. Extending the Approach: We will also discuss how to implement similar steps for subsequent approval levels.

Technical Implementation:

We can understand the complete development flow with the step-by-step instructions.

Step 1 & 2 : SAP BTP BPA Setup  In the SAP BPA setup, we have two key steps. First, ensure that the SPA BTP SAP Build Process service instance and service key are available. Assuming this is already in place, move on to the next step: make sure the SAP BPA Destination is also set up. Below, you’ll find a sample diagram illustrating the SAP BPA Destination, which will be used later to trigger the SAP BPA API for task retrieval and task completion.

Step 3 & 4 : API Identification from SAP API Hub aka Business Accelerator , Before delving into the solution, let’s closely examine the SAP Build Process Automation API. Together, we’ll explore how this API facilitates Workflow Tasks and Task Completion. Additionally, we’ll learn how to use it to post SAP Build process automation tasks:

  1. Querying Tasks in ‘READY’ Status (step 3): In the SAP API hub (specifically the SAP Business Accelerator Hub), you’ll discover an API that allows retrieval of user task instances based on specific parameters."
  1. Post the SAP Build process automation task task with READY Status via  via API (Step 4).

Querying the SAP Build Process Automations Tasks which are in “READY” Status.

In the SAP API hub, specifically the SAP Business Accelerator Hub, you’ll find the API that allows us to retrieve user task instances based on specific parameters. To get started, follow these steps:

  1. Navigate to the Monitoring Tab: Within your SAP environment, go to the monitoring tab.
  2. Identify the Workflow Instance: Find the specific workflow instance you’re interested in. Note down the process ID; this serves as the Workflow instance ID.
  3. Filter by Status: Filter the tasks by the status ‘READY.’ This indicates that the task is ready for processing.

Important Attributes

Values

Client ID

<<Value of client id from SAP BPA Service key>> 

Client Secret

<<Value of client secret from SAP BPA Service key>>

URL

https://spa-api-gateway-bpi-eu-prod.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/public/workflow/rest/v1/task-instances

OAuth Token URL

https://<<YOUR Domain>>.authentication.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token

let's understand the above flow in a glance:

Patch the Task via API: sample Payload for the Patch API which will be used to update task

 

{
    "subject": "Patch API Sample",
     "status": "COMPLETED",
     "decision" :"approve"   
}

 

Step 5 & 6:  SAP Build Process Automation based Actions Project with API from Step 3 & 4

Implementation of the SAP Build Process Automation Based Actions Project. We have created a Action project named Auto approval action and selected the Api for the Querying tasks and update the tasks by ID. We have shown above how we will pass the parameters in sequence.

Below diagram will help you to create the action project step by step instructions.

Step 7 & 8 : Approval Step in workflow: For demonstration purposes, we’ve set up a straightforward approval step that automatically approves tasks if they remain incomplete for one day.

The following sequence outlines the critical steps for this blog Below sequence of steps are the most critical steps for this blog.

Main Process Design implementing dead line monitoring 

  1. Add the Timer Event
    • This step involves setting up a timer event in your workflow. The timer will wait for 1 day before proceeding to the next step. During this time, the work item will remain in a pending state.
    • Explanation: When a work item enters this stage, the timer starts counting down. After 1 day, it triggers the next action.
  2. Add the Sub Workflow Step:
    • Right after the timer event, insert a sub workflow step. This is where you can define additional actions or processes related to the work item.
    • Explanation: The sub workflow allows you to perform specific tasks or checks before moving forward. It acts as an intermediary step between the timer event and the auto approval process.
  3. Process the Auto Approval:
    • In the sub workflow step, implement the auto approval logic. This could involve checking certain conditions (e.g., work item type, requester, or other relevant data) to determine if the item can be automatically approved.
    • Explanation: If the conditions are met, the work item will be approved automatically without manual intervention. Otherwise, it will follow a different path based on your workflow design.

Remember to configure the details of each step according to your specific workflow requirements. Feel free to customize the timer duration, approval criteria, and any other relevant settings.

Sub Workflow Design: most important part of the blog

  1. Create an Input Variable for Retrieving the Parent Process ID:
    • Begin by defining an input variable in your workflow. This variable will store the parent process ID.
    • Explanation: The parent process ID is essential for tracking the relationship between sub-processes and their main process.
  2. Map the Input Variable from the Main Process:
    • In your main process, ensure that you map the input variable (containing the parent process ID) to the appropriate value.
    • Explanation: By mapping the variable, you establish a connection between the main process and any sub-processes that rely on this information.
    •  
  3. Create an automation Step-in your main process, This help to set the "READY" "approve" and "COMPELTED"  flag which will be used in the action task later.

     

  4.  Configure the Sub Process Action Task:
    • Use the get task instances  API ( explained in the step 3 & 4) to retrieve relevant information related to the process ID. Within the sub process, add an action task. This task will query the task API using the provided “Process ID” and specific parameters.
    • Implement Auto Approval Logic in the Sub Process: Call the Task Completion API and Auto Approve the Task 😊 😊

Remember to adapt  any additional settings / API / Logic  as needed.

Wow, We Are Done with Auto Approval! 😊

For testing purposes, feel free to set the wait time as short as 1 minute.

This approach can be scaled for auto approval, rejection, or escalation to the next level.

Conclusion Remarks: I hope you enjoyed this blog. The techniques discussed here can be applied to various scenarios, enhancing efficiency, and streamlining processes. For more insights into handling further complexity, stay tuned for our next blog by my colleague, Adwait.

Thank you for reading, and happy automating! 

Please feel free to get in touch with me over Linkedin.

Regards, 

Mohit Bansal ,

SAP BTP Platform Advisory & Solution Architect

entry.title: Re: Monitor a specific Database Table for no. of entries

entry.title: Find Text object Code from SO10 smartforms
entry.content:
Hello Mates, 

I am currently working with Smart Forms and have encountered an issue with an include text. When attempting to find the actual code in SO10 using the text name and text ID, the system returns no results. Could you advise on what specific input is required to retrieve the underlying code for the text?

entry.title: Re: Alert Configuration(Standard and Custom process) in SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi ,

I have tried same thing but Error information "$error_text$" is not coming for Ariba Adapter, for other adapter it is coming. Any suggestion Please.

Regards,

Mani

entry.title: Re: Find Text object Code from SO10 smartforms
entry.content: ok

entry.title: Re: Push notification when Orders have been unassigned fr...
entry.content:
Hello @aziz96,

I have implemented a similar scenario: I send out an email in case a supporting technician is unassigned from an activity.

For this, I compared the supportingPersons from old with them of new and determined the delta with the help of a JavaScript function. The results in the delta will receive the information about the cancelled activity.

Another way could be to check the service assignment delete instead the activity update. The issue with this approach: it could be that information you need for sending the notification are already deleted before you can catch them.

Therefore, I prefer the first attempt.

Best regards,

Christoph

entry.title: Re: Find Text object Code from SO10 smartforms
entry.content: text id is already used by sap standard use another text id.

entry.title: Re: Back to basics with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) - part 16
entry.content:
Links to resources relevant for and mentioned in this episode:

  • This week's SAP Developer News https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8zC6l1_jFmg
  • New YT Short "Controlling CAP server log levels" https://www.youtube.com/shorts/C_0Za3wTcEM 
  • Examples of OData action and function definitions https://github.com/SAP-samples/odata-basics-handsonsapdev/blob/main/srv/main.cds 
  • (Capire) Actions & Functions https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/providing-services#actions-functions 
  • (Capire) Custom Actions and Functions https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/cds/cdl#actions

entry.title: Re: Oracle Table not visible from Power Designer

entry.title: Re: What's the difference between Convergent Mediation Cloud Edition and SAP CPI/CI(Cloud Integratio
entry.content: Why is SAP pushing such a solution instead of building corresponding standard content in integration suite? Makes zero sense strategically to buy and maintain these micro products for every special niche use-case.

entry.title: Re: Empty sales area BP tcode
entry.content:
Hi Daniel

You must choose the given sales area by either pressing the button 'Sales Areas' or 'Switch area'.

Then your sales related data will be visible to you.

Best Regards,
Gitte

entry.title: Need help to get Supplier location deleted in Ariba when the BP vendor is blocked /deletion flag set
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are facing an issue when the BP vendor record is set for deletion flag / Posting block in S4 & it should trigger the "Supplier Location delete & Remittance Location delete" file on the BADI - ARBCIG_MASTERDATA but it is not triggering any data in the arbcig_changedoc to send this file to Ariba to delete the respective supplier's location.

Appreciate any inputs to fix the above issue on the SLP - S4 integration / sync.

Thanks,

Chethan G K

entry.title: Re: First steps using the Hana Vector Engine with SAP GEN AI
entry.content: I did try it. But not understanding why it is returning the same error every time.

entry.title: Fiori elements analytic page, hide table options
entry.content:
Hi *,

I want to have analytic page, but without charts section, so only visual and regular smart filers and table, so table type here selected should be third icon, then hidden, so user can not toggle between modes.

 

Any help would be useful.

Thanks in an advance.

entry.title: Re: PR generated but Vendor not picked
entry.content:
Since after running MRP, the Vendor was assigned automatically, you should use the Regular Vendor or Quota Arrangement.

When you use the Regular vendor, pls check if the information recode valid date  is earlier than 13.01.2025.

If you use Quota Arrangement, pls check if the Quota Arrangement valid date is earlier than 13.01.2025.

entry.title: Re: Clean Core: custom checks in a Production Order
entry.content:
Hi Caetano,

Thanks A Lot for sharing such Wonderful & Most Useful Info.
This requirement comes up very frequently from the Business

Best Regards
Raja
